label: Open Memory Recall Lane
description: Public fixture lane with published memories, queries, and explicit thresholds. This is an openly rerunnable comparison lane, not a claim of official LongMemEval or LoCoMo parity.

memories.content: Claude proxy endpoint is /proxy/anthropic/v1/messages and Claude proxy mode should export ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL.
OpenAI chat proxy requests go to /proxy/v1/chat/completions and use OPENAI_BASE_URL.
If the auth setup changes from OAuth to API key or back, tell users to rerun memoryoss setup.
For this repo, name feature branches feat/<ticket>-<slug>.
Never show raw memory entries unless the user explicitly asks; short summaries or counts are enough.

cases.query: which endpoint handles Anthropic messages through the proxy?
what should users do after an auth mode change?
how should feature branches be named here?
what is the display preference for raw memory entries?
cases.expected_anchor: short summaries or counts are enough

cases.query: what is the capital of France?
explain quantum entanglement in one paragraph
